findings.summary: Skill-quality changes need working examples or regression evidence; prose-only rewrites are not enough for promotion.
Skill amendments should cite observed failure, user feedback, or a reference-set gap rather than broad style preference.
The evaluator can recommend a maintainer PR, but it cannot update package, plugin, catalog, or publication state itself.

recommended_next_action.action: Use the promoted skill-quality playbook for PRs that add, rewrite, or amend skills, agents, commands, or rules guidance.
